products.name: Green 1.0 Top
products.description: Leve e respirável — o Top Green 1.0 combina conforto com materiais sustentáveis.
products.description_en: Light and breathable — the Green 1.0 Top combines comfort with sustainable materials.

characteristics.label: Material
characteristics.value: 68% Fibra de azeitona reciclada, 24% Poliéster reciclado, 8% Elastano
characteristics.value_en: 68% Recycled olive fibre, 24% Recycled polyester, 8% Elastane

characteristics.label: Acabamento
characteristics.value: Antibacteriano natural derivado de subprodutos do azeite
characteristics.value_en: Natural antibacterial derived from olive oil by-products

characteristics.label: Lavagem
characteristics.value_en: Machine wash 30°C, do not tumble dry

traceability.material_source: Resíduos da produção de azeite — Alentejo, Portugal
traceability.material_source_en: Olive oil production waste — Alentejo, Portugal
